title.en: In this way, he can truly protect the safety of...

content.en:
In the following days, only a few sparse demon seeds in the Endless Gap Realm sneaked in to collect resources, and even avoided Ye Tian, and did not dare to wait here for a long time, and left quickly after finding resources.

They are also afraid that they will be killed by Ye Tian, then there will be nothing.

In this way, the human race can be regarded as occupying this boundary in disguise.

However, in order to prevent the demon seeds from sending a large number of high-level realm gods to invade this realm again, Ye Tian's copy body still had to sit here.

In this way, he can truly protect the safety of the gods of the human race.

In this way, the resources of the Endless Seam Realm continued to pour into the Terran Temple, and the resources of the Terran Temple increased wildly, which was used to cultivate a large number of Realm Gods.

As the years passed, there were more and more realm gods of the human race, and more and more mid-level realm gods.

And on this day, there were a few more mid-level peak realm gods.

According to this development, there will definitely be more and more middle-level peak realm gods of the human race, but if you want to catch up with the number of middle-level peak realm gods of the top forces, you will definitely not be able to do it in a short period of time, and it will take a long time.

After a long period of 05 years, the resources of the Endless Seam Realm are much less, and many resources are still being rapidly conceived, but this speed is not able to be conceived all at once, and the gestation speed of the top resources is longer.

But in any case, it will eventually be conceived.

......

Almost all the resources of the Endless Realm Gap Realm will be appraised by Ye Tian, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue will also help deal with these resources, and classify them after identification, if they are useful resources for high-level realm gods, they will be deducted and used by them.

this day.

Ye Tian found a resource that could replace the Black Leaf Demon Gold.

【Demon Stygian Sand】

This is a black and uneven grain of sand, at first because of its small size, Ye Tian didn't care too much.

Mainly, this kind of Demon Xuansha energy is restrained, and it is almost mediocre.

Therefore, he didn't regard this Demon Soul Xuansha as a good thing, he had seen it a few times before, but he didn't care about it, and he didn't even pick it up.

This time, he found that the demon seed he killed had this substance on his body, so he checked it by the way, and only then did he discover the preciousness of the Demon Dark Sand.

The Demon Immortal Xuansha can't directly refine the Eternal Dao Seed, but the Demon Immortal Xuansha can make the Eternal Dao Seed refining easier.

In other words, after using the Demon Immortal Sand to integrate into the Eternal Dao Seed, under the influence of the Demon Stygian Xuansha, the effect of refining the Eternal Dao Seed with other resources will be very good, that is, the difficulty of refining the Eternal Dao Seed will be reduced.

"Using the Demon Dark Sand combined with the Black Leaf Demon Gold, this cultivation speed will be much faster. "

Ye Tian thought so.

So, he began to collect a large number of Demon Nether Sand in the future, and any Demon Nether Sand found by any Terran Realm God in the Endless Rift Realm could be traded to the Terran Temple in exchange for other useful resources.

The Demon Nether Sand is useless to ordinary realm gods, but it is harmful, if you hold the Demon Netherworld Sand for a long time, the Eternal Dao Seed will be affected.

As for refining, it is even more undaring, unless you want to transform into a demon seed, you dare to refine the Demon Immortal Xuansha.

Therefore, those realm gods would hardly hide the Demon Soul Xuansha, and they would all take it out for the human temple, and naturally it would fall into Ye Tian's hands.

That's it.

Ye Tian used the Demon Dark Sand and the Black Leaf Demon Gold to cultivate and improve his Eternal Dao Species, striving to raise the Eternal Dao Species to the current limit as soon as possible.

While Ye Tian was cultivating like this, his wife and children were also cultivating like this, but they had become high-level realm gods a little later, so their progress was naturally not as good as Ye Tian's.

Gradually, another long time passed.

At this time.

The death zone of the Eternal Frontier is gradually disappearing, which means that the complete recovery of the Eternal Frontier is just around the corner.

Moreover, the energy of the Eternal Realm is also rising sharply, but one of the results of this is that the energy of the Realm God Realm is declining.

All of a sudden, many forces in the Realm God Realm were panicked, after all, it was the first time that they had experienced a drop in the energy of the Realm God Realm.

But gradually, they all knew why.

This is the Eternal Realm absorbing the energy of the Realm God Realm, but not too much.

Compared with the Eternal Realm, the Realm God Realm was already in a secondary position, and it was the Eternal Realm that had an accident before, and the Realm Court Headquarters had transferred the energy of the Eternal Realm into the Realm God Realm.

Now that the Eternal Realm has been restored, some of this energy has naturally been fed back.

But this time, the energy of the Realm God Realm has fallen, which has really made many forces realize that the Eternal Realm will dominate in the future, and the Realm God Realm will be surpassed by the Eternal Realm in the future.

Then, many top forces and powerful forces are estimated to have their headquarters relocated to the Eternal Border.

It's a pity that even if those small forces want to relocate to the Eternal Border, they are not qualified, and they can't even smuggle in.

Finally, on this day, the Eternal Frontier was fully restored, and the Death Zone was gone.

At this time. []

Many of the top forces have started the second relocation, relocating most of their combat power to the Eternal Realm, but they will not let go of the 707 Abandonment Realm God Realm.

In addition, they are also spending the cost to transfer the entrance to the Boundary Rift Boundary of the Realm of the Divine Realm, and transfer the entrance to the Eternal Realm.

......

"All the top forces are relocating, and it seems that in the future, these top forces will be centered on the Eternal Border!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Terran already occupies a large territory, and with his current strength, he can hold it.

Unless it is the supreme force and a very small number of top forces intervene, he is not afraid of any top force.

Soon after.

The relocation of the top forces is over, and the territory of the Eternal Realm has almost been divided, leaving only a very small number of remote and low-energy areas that have not been occupied, and it is also reserved for some weak forces, which is a territory prepared for them.

This also shows that they are more merciful, otherwise it would be too much to occupy all the territory.

Another time passed.

Ye Tian was still practicing, but the Boundary Court Headquarters passed an invitation through the Terran Clan's position personnel who remained in the Boundary Court Headquarters, inviting him to the Boundary Court Headquarters for a meeting.

This meeting is very important, every top force will send a high-level realm god as a representative, and this time it will also include the entire Eternal Realm and the realm of the Realm God, it is definitely a very important matter to discuss.
